title: BONNYCO Led Book Light Wooden Folding Lamp with Remote Control, 16 Colours and Timer. Table Book Lamp Night Light Perfect for Home, Office, Room Decor. Christmas, Birthday Gifts for Women and Men
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: FOLDABLE BOOK LAMP - This walnut wood lamp is perfect for decorating your home or creating a cozy ambient light. It can be opened and positioned in different ways, up to a full 360°. Storing it is very easy: the lamp has a magnetic closure that keeps it securely shut. It will look just like another book on your shelf!

REMOTE CONTROL INCLUDED - Change colour with the remote control and choose from up to 16 colours. You can modify the intensity of the light and use 2 different programs. Also, you can change the colour by opening and closing the lamp! Ideal for office and home decor

TIMER FUNCTION - Set the timer for 30 minutes, 1 hour, or 2 hours so the decorative lamp turns off automatically without you having to do a thing. Rechargeable lamp with 500 lumens and USB connection, made of walnut wood and durable parchment paper

BATTERY DURATION OF MORE THAN 8 HOURS - Desk book lamp with 2,500 mAh battery that lasts more than 8 hours. It is larger than others and can be used while charging. Original birthday, Christmas, & anniversary gifts for her and him

PERFECT AS A GIFT - Surprise anyone with this decorative LED book lamp, an original gift for friends, parents, grandparents, or your partner. They can place it in the living room or bedroom, wherever they like best. A unique home gift idea
description: Product Description Remote control included! The BONNYCO book lamp includes a remote control that allows you to change the colour without having to open and close the book continuously, meaning it will save you plenty of time since it is much simpler to use. In addition, you can use it from more than 800 inches away as long as there is no obstacle between the remote and the book novelty lamp. The remote control has 16 different colours and has 2 integrated dynamic colour change programs: the breathing and flickering programs give a different feel to your environment. Automatic shutdown can be programmed using the 30´, 1h or 2h timer and you can also increase or decrease the brightness of the colours by up to 5 levels . Without a doubt, this book light is a great alternative for office, living room, bedroom and home decor. Why is the BONNYCO book lamp the best option? Battery life of more than 8 hours This led book light has a battery life of more than 8 hours at full capacity. The charging time is 3-4 hours and it can also be used while charging. Magnet on cover With a powerful magnet on the cover , the lamp can be fully opened to its 360º position. Remote control with timer It includes a control remote with a 30´, 1h and 2h timer function so that the lamp automatically turns off. In addition, it has 16 different colours and two dynamic lighting programs. Information: Made with real walnut wood The sheets are made of parchment paper for greater resistance. Measurements: : 8.46 x 6.61 x 0.98 in Includes manual that covers all its characteristics, ways of use and basic information Includes remote control with 16 colours, 5 levels of light intensity and timer Includes 59.01 in USB cable to charge the battery Turn each space into your favourite corner, wherever you are. Give a special touch to your workplace . Make yourself feel at home and find inspiration with small details that awaken emotions. Relax in your living room with the light of the led book lamp set at minimum intensity mode to create a unique space. Take advantage of the darkness of a night on the terrace and add a touch of colour to those moments of peace and quiet. Original gift for birthday and Christmas This elegant book lamp is surely a great original gift for women, men or teens . In addition to being very beautiful, it has different functions such as a nightstand lamp, a reading lamp or a decorative lamp for the home, room, living room or office. It is an original gift for birthdays, Christmas, Valentine's, Father's and Mother's Day and other important events.
